Id1.text: Doug Moench was the creator of the comic character Ballistic, who has the alternative name Kelvin Mao.

Id2.text: Ballistic (also known as Kelvin Mao) is a fictional comic superhero created by Doug Moench.

Id3.text: Doug Moench created the character Ballistic, the fictional superhero whose alter ego is Kelvin Mao.
